diagrams.title: JTextField Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the inheritance hierarchy from JComponent to JPasswordField
diagrams.purpose: Understand available methods and inheritance relationships for JTextField and its variants.

diagrams.title: JTextField Event Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows when different listeners are triggered during user interaction
elements: User Presses Key → KeyListener (keyPressed, keyReleased, keyTyped)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the event sequence and choose appropriate listener for specific use cases.

diagrams.title: DocumentFilter Processing Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates how DocumentFilter intercepts and processes text input
elements: If Valid: call super.insertString() to proceed
If Invalid: do not insert or modify
diagrams.purpose: Understand input filtering mechanism and implement custom validation logic.
